scene_description:
### Foreground to Background Description  

**Road Surface & Markings**:  
- The road dominates the center foreground and extends into the background. It is an asphalt surface with a **solid yellow line** (center, dividing the two lanes) and a **solid white line** (right edge, marking the road’s boundary). The road has two lanes; the left lane (from the viewer’s perspective) is narrower than the right lane. The driving side is **right-hand traffic** (evidenced by the white line on the right edge).  
- A dirt shoulder runs along the left edge of the road (left foreground), and a mix of dirt and sparse grass runs along the right edge (right foreground). The road surface shows minor wear but no significant damage.  

**Infrastructure**:  
- **Utility poles**: Two wooden utility poles are visible.  
  - Left mid-foreground: A tall wooden pole with a crossbar at the top, supporting multiple overhead wires (several horizontal wires extend to the right and a few vertical wires).  
  - Right mid-foreground: A similar tall wooden pole with a crossbar, supporting overhead wires (one wire extends to the left). No transformers or insulators are visible on either pole.  
- **Bollards/Barriers/Guardrails**: None present. The road edges are open to vegetation.  

**Vegetation & Terrain**:  
- **Left side (from road)**: Dense green vegetation (bushes, low shrubs) extends from the road’s left edge into the mid-ground. A small area of dry, rocky ground is visible near the left utility pole, with scattered patches of grass. Further left, the terrain slopes downward into a valley with more dense greenery and distant trees.  
- **Right side (from road)**: A sloped, rocky terrain with dry, light-brown grass and sparse green bushes. The slope rises to the right edge of the image, where a mix of dry soil and rocky outcrops is visible. Scattered trees (broad-leafed, not coniferous) and dense shrubs are present on the slope.  
- **Background**: The road curves slightly to the right and disappears into the distance. Beyond the road, rolling hills covered in dense green vegetation extend to the horizon. The terrain is hilly, with the left side sloping into a valley and the right side rising gradually.  

**Buildings & Architecture**:  
- Left mid-background: A small structure with a **corrugated metal sheet** (light gray) is partially visible, obscured by vegetation. It appears to be a shed or small enclosure.  
- Far left background: Distant small structures (possibly houses or sheds) are visible, nestled among trees and hills.  

**Vehicles & Plates**:  
- No vehicles are present in the image.  

**Text & Signs**:  
- No text, signs, or banners are visible.  

**Other Infrastructure**:  
- No street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or bollards are present.  
- The sky is blue with scattered white clouds.  

**Summary of Key Elements by Position**:  
- **Left foreground**: Dirt shoulder, dense green vegetation, wooden utility pole (with wires), and small corrugated metal structure.  
- **Center foreground**: Two-lane asphalt road (solid yellow center line, solid white right edge line).  
- **Right foreground**: Dirt shoulder, dry grass, wooden utility pole (with wires), rocky slope.  
- **Mid-ground**: Rolling hills with dense green vegetation (left) and dry, rocky slope with sparse shrubs (right); distant small structures (left).  
- **Background**: Curving road, hilly terrain with vegetation, and scattered clouds in the sky.

details.name: yellow center line
details.reason: A solid yellow center line is a specific road marking used in various right-hand traffic countries.
details.focused_description: A yellow center line is visible. It is a long, continuous line with a slightly curved shape following the road's contour. The line is primarily yellow in color, with some faded and worn sections (especially towards the bottom of the crop). The material appears to be paint applied to the asphalt surface. There are no visible markings or text on the line.

details.name: white edge line
details.reason: A solid white line on the right edge marks the road boundary, characteristic of certain road standards.
details.focused_description: The white edge line is a continuous, straight line (following the road's curve) on the right side of the asphalt road. It is white in color, made of paint, has a smooth texture, and appears in good condition with no visible damage or markings.

details.name: wooden pole
details.reason: The style of wooden utility poles with crossbars is common in many rural or developing regions.
details.focused_description: A tall, cylindrical wooden pole. It is light brown in color with a rough, natural wood texture showing weathering and minor surface imperfections. The pole has small dark markings and knots along its length. At the top, a dark fixture (likely metal) is visible where a wire is attached. The pole stands vertically and appears aged from exposure to the elements. No text is present on the pole.

details.name: corrugated metal structure
details.reason: Corrugated metal construction is often seen in specific tropical or rural environments.
details.focused_description: A rectangular corrugated metal sheet with horizontal ridges, light gray in color, mounted vertically. The sheet exhibits the characteristic wavy pattern of corrugated metal and appears to be supported by dark-colored vertical posts on either side. No visible text or distinct markings are present.
